description: Case style: Stainless steel circular case Dial style: Black dial, white and orange markings, white hands with steel colour accents, branding at the 12 and 6 hour mark Features: Screw to reset time Strap style: Synthetic leather strap in black with a tang clasp, has orange accents, holes for a customised fit Water resistance: 50 mWarranty: 2 years on mechanism only (1 year on battery)
